html:
In this podcast episode from Tekpon, “Increase your payment processing approvals" you'll hear from Robert Podlesni, Chief Product Officer and Co-Founder of Revolv3, on the inside scoop into payments to help your business increase revenue and reduce costs. The Tekpon podcast gives SaaS founders the opportunity to share their past stories, current products, and future visions.

In this episode, Podlesni shares his journey into the payments industry and how it lead to co-founding Revolv3. He emphasizes the significance of a team that aligns in goals, vision, and values for achieving success together and discusses how Revolv3 is differentiating itself from other payment solutions in the market. In this episode, Podlesni shares how the payments industry is always evolving, presenting new opportunities to bring innovative solutions to the market, like Revolv3.

About Revolv3

Founded in 2020, Revolv3 is a payment company with a cutting-edge SaaS optimization platform that revolutionizes billing for card-on-file merchants. By leveraging adaptive technology, Revolv3 ensures the industry's highest credit card approval rates, resulting in increased revenue, reduced churn, and improved cost efficiency. Businesses with recurring revenue can rest easy knowing that the payment processing solutions offered by Revolv3 are customized to fit their specific needs and preferences. If you’re interested in learning more, speak to the Revolv3 team today.

You can find this podcast episode on Youtube, Spotify, or Apple Podcasts.
